chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.1863 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on MA No.11154/2022 3. For hearing of bail application 15-12-2022 Mst. Fatima Khalid, applicant’s mother is present in person. Mr. Mamoon A.K. Sherwany, Advocate for complainant. Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl.P.G. ============= Applicant’s mother is present in person once again today and submits that she will not engage a counsel but her main grievance appears to be that the learned trial court is not proceeding with the matter expeditiously. She however submits that she will be satisfied and not press this bail application if directions are given to the learned trial court to conclude the trial expeditiously. While dismissing this bail application, not on merits, but as being withdrawn by the applicant, I have been informed by Mr. Mamoon A.K. Sherwany, learned counsel for the complainant that the case is pending before a model court and that it is expected that the same will be decided soon however the delay in trial perhaps is due to co- accused, who is on bail. Looking to the anxiety of the applicant’s mother it would be appropriate to direct the learned model court to expedite the trial and finish the same within a maximum period of 3 months. No unnecessary adjournments should be granted to either side and if prosecution witnesses do not appear the learned model court to use its best efforts to procure their attendance. In view of the above, this bail application is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending application. Let a copy of this order be sent to the learned model court as well as learned Prosecutor General, Sindh so that he may instruct his Prosecutor to act expeditiously to conclude the trial within the stipulated period.

In view of the above, this bail application is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending application. Let a copy of this order be sent to the learned model court as well as learned Prosecutor General, Sindh so that he may instruct his Prosecutor to act expeditiously to conclude the trial within the stipulated period. JUDGE saleem
